name: Katana
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Next-generation crawling and spidering framework from ProjectDiscovery. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: A Go binary: `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/katana/cmd/katana@latest`, or install from the AUR (`yay -S katana`). See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
